tasks.subject: Task 1: Shape detector (_redact_kv_shape) + credential-name vocab helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the first redaction pass that catches the exact PROGRESS:213 leak shape — list[dict] items with `key` + `value` keys where `key`'s value names a credential env var.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py` (add `_PROTECTED_NAME_SUFFIXES`, `_PROTECTED_NAME_WHOLES`, `_is_credential_name`, `_redact_kv_shape`)
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py` (add 4 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Canonical RED test: RunPod env array `[{"key": "RUNPOD_API_KEY", "value": "rpa_REAL"}, {"key": "HF_TOKEN", "value": "hf_REAL"}, {"key": "PYTHONUNBUFFERED", "value": "1"}]` redacts env[0].value + env[1].value to `<REDACTED>`; env[2].value preserved as "1".
- Extra-keys case: `{"key": "API_KEY", "value": "x", "comment": "y"}` inside list still redacts.
- Non-credential key: `{"key": "IMAGE_NAME", "value": "alpine:latest"}` passes through.
- Top-level `{"key": "x", "value": "y"}` NOT inside list passes through (list-parent requirement).
- `_is_credential_name` True for `RUNPOD_API_KEY`, `HF_TOKEN`, `FAL_KEY`, `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`, `DB_PASSWORD`, `SSH_PASSPHRASE`.
- `_is_credential_name` False for `PYTHONUNBUFFERED`, `IMAGE_NAME`, `GPU_COUNT`, `keypoints`, `checkpoints`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'kv_shape or credential_name'` → all 4 PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'kv_shape or credential_name'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RunPod env array canonical RED redacts value side of credential-named entries only", "Extra-keys case still redacts", "Non-credential name passes through", "Top-level {key,value} not in list passes through", "_is_credential_name vocab matches spec §4.1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Value-pattern matcher (_redact_credential_patterns + _redact_string)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the third redaction pass — recursive value-side regex sweep covering every credential prefix from spec §4.3 with sk- false-positive guard.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py` (add `_CREDENTIAL_PATTERNS`, `_redact_string`, `_redact_credential_patterns`)
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py` (add parametrised credential-format test, sk- guard test, recursion test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All 7 documented patterns catch their respective credential format: `rpa_token`, `hf_token`, `fal_key`, `bearer_auth`, `sk_token`, `aws_access_key`, `pem_private_key`.
- sk- guard rejects `ask-me about checkpoints` (no `\b`), `sk-only-4chars` (length gate), `sk-`, `sk-aaa`.
- sk- guard accepts `sk-proj-` + 20+ url-safe chars and `sk-ant-api03-` + 20+ url-safe chars.
- PEM block matched wholesale (BEGIN through END inclusive).
- Nested credential `{"a": {"b": ["c", {"d": "rpa_REAL_TOKEN_12345"}]}}` is caught.
- Canonical `pattern_name` strings in `_CREDENTIAL_PATTERNS` match spec §4.3 table.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'credential_pattern or sk_guard or pattern_recursion'` → 14 PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'credential_pattern or sk_guard or pattern_recursion'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 7 patterns catch their respective format", "sk- guard rejects prose + short content", "sk- guard accepts real keys", "PEM block matched wholesale", "Recursion into nested structures", "Canonical pattern_name strings match spec §4.3"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Composition _redact_all + key-walker regression coverage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the three passes into `_redact_all` in fixed order (shape → key-name → pattern), lock down idempotence, prove existing key-name walker still works through composition.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py` (add `_redact_all`)
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py` (add 3 composition tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `_redact_all({"env": [{"key": "RUNPOD_API_KEY", "value": "rpa_REAL12345"}]})["env"][0]["value"] == "<REDACTED>"`.
- `_redact_all(_redact_all(x)) == _redact_all(x)` (idempotence).
- Existing key-name walker behaviour re-validated through composition (Token/password/imageName/Secret_Tail test).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'redact_all'` → 3 PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'redact_all'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Composition catches RunPod env shape", "Idempotent", "Existing key-name walker behaviour preserved through composition"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Audit primitives (LeakHit + _audit_for_leaks + CredentialLeakError)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add typed primitives the runtime backstop and fixtures-audit lockdown both depend on.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py` (add `LeakHit` NamedTuple, `_audit_for_leaks`, `_escape_pointer_segment`, `CredentialLeakError`)
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py` (add 5 audit + leak-error tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `_audit_for_leaks` on clean payload returns `[]`.
- `_audit_for_leaks` on `{"data": {"deep": {"k": "rpa_REAL_TOKEN_12345"}}}` returns one `LeakHit(pattern_name="rpa_token", json_pointer="/data/deep/k", match_snippet[:32])`.
- List indices appear as numeric JSON pointer segments (`/env/0/value`).
- `CredentialLeakError` is `Exception` subclass, NOT `AssertionError`.
- `str(CredentialLeakError)` formats as spec §5.4 multi-line block (refusing to write…/ pattern + pointer per hit / Update hint).
- RFC 6901 escape `~`→`~0`, `/`→`~1` applied to dict keys.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'audit or leak_error'` → 5 PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'audit or leak_error'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Clean payload returns []", "Buried credential returns one LeakHit with pattern + pointer + snippet", "List indices in JSON pointer", "CredentialLeakError is Exception not AssertionError", "__str__ formats per spec §5.4"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire _redact_all + backstop into _RecordingHTTPSeam.flush()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewire `_RecordingHTTPSeam.flush()` to use `_redact_all` at both call sites and run `_audit_for_leaks` backstop that raises `CredentialLeakError` BEFORE any fixture file is written.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py` (rewire `_RecordingHTTPSeam.flush()` body — lines 296–323)
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py` (add 1 backstop test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `flush()` uses `_redact_all` at request_body redaction site (line 299) AND response redaction site (line 319).
- `flush()` runs `_redact_string(_redact_query_string(raw_query))[:200]` for meta.request_query.
- `flush()` runs `_audit_for_leaks(payload)` after constructing payload; raises `CredentialLeakError(hits, filename)` BEFORE `write_text` if hits non-empty.
- Existing `test_recording_seam_dispatches_to_named_files` still passes (apiKey caught by key-walker).
- New backstop test: monkeypatch `_redact_all` to identity, post `Bearer abcdef…`, assert `CredentialLeakError` raised with `pattern_name == "bearer_auth"`, no fixture on disk.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'flush or backstop or recording'` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'flush or backstop or recording'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flush() uses _redact_all at both call sites", "meta.request_query wrapped with _redact_string", "_audit_for_leaks + CredentialLeakError gate before write_text", "Existing dispatch tests still pass", "Backstop test passes — exception raised, no file on disk"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: _safe_log wrapper + dispatcher logger rewires
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap `_log.warning` calls in `_runpod_dispatch` + `_comfy_dispatch` with `_safe_log` applying `_redact_string` to every string substitution arg before format.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py` (add `_safe_log`; rewire two `_log.warning(...)` call sites at ~line 179 and ~line 218)
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py` (add 1 safe_log test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `_safe_log(_log, logging.WARNING, "container started, key=%s, count=%d", "rpa_REAL12345", 42)` — log record `getMessage()` returns `"container started, key=<REDACTED>, count=42"`.
- Non-string args (int 42) pass through unchanged.
- Format string itself is NOT redacted (author-controlled).
- Existing dispatcher tests' WARNING-emission assertions still pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'safe_log or dispatch'` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'safe_log or dispatch'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["String args redacted before format substitution", "Non-string args pass through unchanged", "Format string itself not redacted", "Dispatcher tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Cross-tree fixtures-audit lockdown test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock down every committed `tests/**/*.json` against future credential leaks via `_audit_for_leaks` walk.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/providers/test_fixtures_audit.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Test walks every `*.json` file under `tests/` recursively.
- Skips malformed (non-JSON) files via `json.JSONDecodeError` exception handler.
- For each file, runs `_audit_for_leaks(payload)`.
- Failure message lists each offending file path + every hit (pattern_name + json_pointer + match_snippet).
- Test PASSES against current `build/layer-p` tree (zero leaks per PROGRESS:213 attestation).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_fixtures_audit.py -v` → PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/test_fixtures_audit.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_fixtures_audit.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Walks every tests/**/*.json", "Skips non-JSON gracefully", "Runs _audit_for_leaks per payload", "Failure message lists offenders with hits", "Passes against current clean tree"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Documentation + PROGRESS closure + full-gate verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land contributor docs (AGENTS.md + .env.example header + README "Credential safety" section), close PROGRESS Layer P Task 7 bug-fix #1, run full project gate clean.

**Files:**
- Create: `AGENTS.md` (repo root) — contributor guide per spec §7.1
- Modify: `.env.example` (prepend redactor pointer comment block)
- Modify: `README.md` (add "Credential safety in tests" subsection)
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (closure snapshot under Layer P Task 7 item #3)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `AGENTS.md` exists at repo root with four sections from spec §7.1 (rule + redactor + handling CredentialLeakError + adding new pattern + env-var list + out-of-scope).
- `.env.example` first comment block references AGENTS.md "Credential safety in tests" + `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py` redactor.
- `README.md` has new "Credential safety in tests" subsection linking to `AGENTS.md`.
- `PROGRESS.md` closure block under Layer P Task 7 item #3: dated, sub-plan commit table T1–T8, key design decisions, test count delta with actual figure.
- `pixi run pytest -q` → 862 + 29 = 891 PASS + 1 skipped, no regressions.
- `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` → clean.
- `pixi run typecheck` → clean.
- PROGRESS placeholders `<YYYY-MM-DD>`, `<sha>`, `~891` replaced with real LOCAL-timezone date, actual short SHA, actual final test count.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run typecheck` → all exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AGENTS.md", ".env.example", "README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AGENTS.md exists at repo root with spec §7.1 sections", ".env.example prepended with redactor pointer", "README has Credential safety subsection", "PROGRESS closure block with real values", "Full gate clean — pytest + pre-commit + typecheck"]}
```
